aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The cosmos are quiet. That's either peace or the calm before the incident.
aries.prophecy: The universe is silent today. Your Slack is not. It never is.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — The cosmos recommend stillness. Your rollback plan also recommends stillness.
taurus.prophecy: The stars suggest a quiet day of reflection. You will open Jira and immediately close it. Then open it again.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — One of you says yes. The other says absolutely not.
gemini.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You will fill the silence with 47 browser tabs and two conflicting opinions about your own PR.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — You have a bad feeling about this. Trust it. You were right last time too.
cancer.prophecy: The universe says slow down and check in with yourself. Your prod database is also slow. Unrelated. Probably.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — The stage is set. The audience is watching. This deploy will either crown you or become a post-mortem.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos acknowledge your greatness today. Your PR has been sitting in review for three days. The cosmos have opinions about that too.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — You've reviewed the checklist twice, staged it, tested it, reviewed it again. Ship it.
virgo.prophecy: The stars see your meticulous attention to detail. The one test you skipped will find you. It always finds you.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — You've been weighing this for 45 minutes. The decision has made itself without you.
libra.prophecy: The cosmos urge balance and thoughtful decision-making. You have reopened the same ticket four times. That is not balance.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — You know something is wrong. You can't prove it yet. You will.
scorpio.prophecy: The universe is quiet today. That is suspicious. You are already checking the logs.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — You'll deploy without reading the changelog. You never read the changelog. We know.
sagittarius.prophecy: The stars encourage bold exploration. You will push directly to main. The stars did not mean that.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — You have a Q3 deadline and zero patience. The pipeline agrees with your urgency.
capricorn.prophecy: Success is on the horizon. The horizon is six sprints away. There are always more sprints.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — You have a revolutionary idea that just needs one more refactor. It has always needed one more refactor.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos invite you to think outside the box. You will rewrite the entire service instead of fixing the bug. Classic.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — You're still designing the elegant architecture you'll build someday. Today is not that day.
pisces.prophecy: The stars whisper of creativity and flow. You have been staring at the same function for 40 minutes. That is not flow. That is a fugue state.
